examples: The UK Human Fertilisation and Embryology Authority was founded 20 years later.

The findings are being presented today at the 24th annual conference of the European Society of Human Reproduction and Embryology in Barcelona, Spain.
The fertility regulator, the Human Fertilisation and Embryology Authority, aims to reduce the multiple birth rate.
The bulk of the Human Fertilisation and Embryology Act 2008 will come into force on 1 October.
